resolution_note: HP/Papergraphics official materials state 36 m2/hr (388 ft2/hr) outdoor mode as the headline figure. A different reseller page (Digital Color Depot) states 334 ft2/hr (~31 m2/hr) outdoor for what appears to be the same machine. A third source (Franz Reprographics) lists 1130 ft2/hr (~105 m2/hr) for an unspecified 1-pass draft mode. These likely reflect different pass-count/quality settings rather than a true contradiction, but the exact mode boundaries are not consistently documented across sources.
